name: ATP/WTA Tennis Calendar 2026
notes: Major ATP/WTA tournaments 2026 with Norwegian focus. Casper Ruud (ATP top 10) is the primary Norwegian interest — strong on clay (Roland Garros semifinalist). Dates are approximate based on historical scheduling — discovery loop should verify exact dates, draws, and streaming info from atptour.com and wtatennis.com. Eurosport/Discovery+ hold Norwegian broadcast rights for most ATP/WTA events. Between-tournament gaps cause ESPN API staleness (2000+ min) — this curated config ensures continuous tennis coverage.

streaming.notes: Norwegian broadcast rights for ATP/WTA events
